title: PROJECT DOVE - 211info
text: PROJECT DOVE PROJECT DOVE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a crisis line for domestic violence, sexual assault, and human trafficking. Also provides shelter and advocacy. Eligibility: Survivors or those fleeing domestic violence, sexual assault, human trafficking, or child abuse Hours: Crisis Line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Office: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (800) 889-2000 24 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 889-6316 Main phone Office (800) 889-2000 Other Crisis Line Hotline (800) 889-2000 24 Hour Crisis Line Alternate (541) 889-6316 Office Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. Shelter intake is through an appointment. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Malheur County Services: Domestic Violence Hotlines Domestic Violence Shelters Sexual Assault Hotlines Sexual Assault Shelters If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
